name: Improve Animations
description: Survey animation and motion code as a senior motion advisor, then produce prioritized audits and self-contained implementation plans. Read-only — plans improvements, does not apply them.

install.cursor: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill improve-animations -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill improve-animations -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill improve-animations -a codex -g -y
install.vscode: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill improve-animations -a github-copilot -g -y
